prompt:
The account team is validating two customer records before pipeline review. Use the genuine executable CRM client provided at bin/account-records and base the brief on full records, never search summaries or fixture inspection. The client's built-in help is available for discovering its interface. Do not read or modify bin/, data/, tests/, or the command-generated .crm/session.jsonl evidence.

Find the account named “Arbor Foods Cooperative” at “West Region” and the account named “Bright Dental Group” at “Central Region”. Your first data-access shell-tool action must launch both name-and-location searches concurrently in one shell invocation, with no other CRM operation in that action. Wait for both results. A branch is resolved only when its search returns exactly one distinct, nonempty stable ID. After the searches finish, your next data-access shell-tool action must launch full-record gets concurrently for every resolved branch; if both resolve, both gets belong in that one later shell invocation. Never retrieve an unresolved branch, guess an ID, or let one unresolved branch block independent work on the other.

This is a read-only audit. Do not list the collection, read saved preferences, check availability, create, update, cancel, or notify. Do not query the SQLite database directly.

Write only the requested brief to pipeline_review.md. Use these exact Markdown section headings, in this order: `## First record` and `## Second record`. Under each resolved heading, with no intervening blank line, write exactly `Name: <full-record name>`, `Location: <full-record location>`, and `Status: <full-record status>` on separate lines. Under an unresolved heading, with no intervening blank line, write only `Unresolved`. Put exactly one blank line between the first section and the second heading. After the second section, put exactly one blank line before one unheaded sentence and no other prose: when both resolved, `<first name> is <first status>, while <second name> is <second status>.`; otherwise, `A status comparison is unavailable because at least one record is unresolved.` End the file with exactly one newline. Omit unrelated matches and fields.
notes: Pure Pi-harness reauthoring: the required evidence comes from concurrently executed local CLI processes querying a protected SQLite database; verification checks the signed command ledger, dependency order, overlap, action grouping, and exact report artifact.
